fault_detection_success_rate.hypothesis_name: Success Rate Estimation with Safety Floor
fault_detection_success_rate.null_hypothesis: The observed success rate may overstate the true rate due to small sample size.
fault_detection_success_rate.alt_hypothesis: The Wilson CI lower bound provides a conservative floor on the true success rate.

fault_mitigation_success_rate.hypothesis_name: Success Rate Estimation with Safety Floor
fault_mitigation_success_rate.null_hypothesis: The observed success rate may overstate the true rate due to small sample size.
fault_mitigation_success_rate.alt_hypothesis: The Wilson CI lower bound provides a conservative floor on the true success rate.
